run.shape: 8xMI350 TP1 PP1 CP1 FSDP8 EP8 MBS1 S4096 GBS128

additive_max_rank_step2_ms.read: Disabling full activation checkpointing removes about 6.9s from the named backward phase but does not materially reduce the 4.5-4.6s fwd/bwd call-boundary residual.

torchprof_mean_runtime_ms_per_rank.read: The checkpointed MmBackward0 wall almost disappears under no-AC, including its 4.7s hipFree half. The unattributed hipFree half remains about 4.66s and still matches the fwd/bwd wrapper residual.

decision.backward_target: Split into two branches: checkpointed dense/recompute/MmBackward0 lifetime work, and MORI routed backward skew/VJP. No-AC proves MmBackward0 is an activation-checkpoint-induced branch, not a core MoE kernel.
decision.wrapper_target: The 4.5s wrapper is not structured logging, not explicit release_tensors, not after-call bookkeeping, and not phase pre_sync. It is best matched by unattributed synchronizing hipFree at forward_backward_step return/unwind.
decision.next_action: Instrument or alter tensor lifetime/free at the FSDP/autograd/checkpoint boundary: saved tensor hooks, FSDP unshard/free timing, checkpoint wrapper output lifetime, or allocator reuse/parking beyond expandable_segments.
